analytics.title: Advanced analytics
analytics.subtitle: Team performance, revenue and customer satisfaction.

staffPerformance.noData: No staff data for the selected period and filters.
staffPerformance.footnote: No-shows: confirmed bookings whose date passed without being completed or cancelled. · Revenue calculated from service price on completed bookings. · Rating: average of client reviews linked to completed bookings in the period.

clientRetention.title: Client retention & behavior
clientRetention.subtitle: Analyze loyalty, lifetime value and visit patterns.
clientRetention.ltvSub: average revenue per client in period
clientRetention.noData: No data for the selected period and filters.
clientRetention.noLineData: Not enough data for the trend chart.
clientRetention.heatmapSubtitle: Bookings in period by time slot
clientRetention.noHeatmapData: No bookings in this period to generate the heatmap.
clientRetention.churnSubtitle: No visit in the last {days} days (with 2+ historical bookings). Max 50.
clientRetention.noChurnRisk: No clients at churn risk with current filters.
clientRetention.noServices: No service data for the period.

branchPerformance.noData: No data for the selected period.
branchPerformance.footnote: Occupancy: (attended / theoretical slots) × 100. Theoretical slots = open hours × active staff / avg service duration. New clients had their first visit within the selected range.

satisfaction.alertsNoData: No quality alerts in this period. Great job!
satisfaction.retentionFootnote: Only clients with at least 1 survey response are counted. Return is measured as a new booking within 30 days of the review.
satisfaction.noData: Not enough data for the selected period.

upgradeWall.title: Available on the Business plan

paymentsPage.title: Payments — N1co
paymentsPage.description: Configure N1co credentials to receive subscription payments from companies using Zyncrox. These credentials are platform-wide, they don't belong to any specific company.
paymentsPage.notConfiguredBanner: You haven't configured N1co credentials for the platform yet.
paymentsPage.sectionHint: Get your App ID and API Secret from the N1co panel → General settings → your business.
paymentsPage.secureNote: Credentials are stored securely in the database.
paymentsPage.step1: Log in to panel.n1co.com with your account.
paymentsPage.step2: Go to General settings and select your business.
paymentsPage.step3: Copy the App ID and API Secret shown there.
paymentsPage.step4: Paste them above, test the connection and save. Done!
paymentsPage.txThisMonthSub: successful charges in the current month
paymentsPage.noTransactionsHint: Charges will appear here automatically when the N1co webhook confirms a payment.

n1coPlansSection.sectionHint: Each plan in N1co has a fixed price baked in. If you change the price, you must create a new plan in N1co and update its ID here. The price you configure is what tenants will see on the payment screen.
n1coPlansSection.locationCodeHint: Your N1co account location/business code. Required to create subscriptions.
n1coPlansSection.planIdHint: Get this ID from the N1co panel when creating or viewing the plan.
n1coPlansSection.errorPrice: All prices must be greater than 0.
n1coPlansSection.warningNoPlanId: Plan ID is empty. N1co won't be able to process payments for this plan until it's configured.

priceChangeSection.sectionHint: Define a notice visible in each tenant's panel and send a mass email to all active administrators when you change prices.

priceChangeSection.messagePlaceholderEn: Starting on {date}, plan prices will change...
priceChangeSection.errorNoPlans: Add at least one affected plan.
priceChangeSection.confirmSend: Send the price change notice to all active tenants?

hero.subtitle: Zyncrox transforms appointment management into a seamless experience. Customize, automate, and grow — without technical complexity.
hero.tagline: The booking platform that adapts to your business

how.title: Easy to get started.
how.subtitle: In less than 15 minutes your business can start receiving online bookings.
how.step1Desc: Sign up with your email. In 2 minutes your business is live.
how.step2Desc: Your logo, your colors, your services, your team. The system adapts to you.
how.step3Desc: Your portal goes live at app.zyncrox.com/your-business. Copy the link from the panel and share it wherever you want.
how.step4Desc: Your clients book on their own at any time. Your calendar updates automatically.
how.mock1Subtitle: Start free, no credit card required
how.mock1Terms: By signing up you accept the Terms of Service

features.subtitle: Features designed for real businesses, not marketing demos.
features.f1Desc: When your client picks a time slot, no one else can take it. Eliminates double bookings forever.
features.f2Desc: Manage all your locations and team from one dashboard. Individual schedules and automatic rotations.
features.f3Desc: Logo, colors, cover, and social media. Your booking portal, your identity — not ours.
features.f4Desc: Book a cut + color + treatment in a single flow, same day or different days.
features.f5Desc: Coverage zones with rates and automatic WhatsApp confirmation. No calls, no errors.
features.f6Desc: Custom post-appointment surveys and automatic detection of your most loyal clients.

pain.subtitle: Every business is unique. A system that doesn't understand that works against you.
pain.p1Desc: You can't define different schedules per employee, day, or service. The system decides for you.
pain.p2Desc: Your clients book on a platform that doesn't reflect your business. It's their image, not yours.
pain.p3Title: Impossible to manage teams or locations
pain.p3Desc: Everything in a single view with no flexibility. Growing means multiplying your problems.
pain.p4Title: You pay for what you don't use
pain.p4Desc: Features you never touch, and the ones you need are missing. A fixed price for all realities.

brand.subtitle: Every business using Zyncrox has a completely different portal. Your client never knows it's the same system.

pricing.badge: ⏱ 7 days free · Professional access · No credit card
pricing.trialNote: All plans include a 7-day free trial with Professional-level access. No credit card. Cancel anytime.

widget.tagline: Book your appointment instantly. We only fill in the key details.

faq.q1: Do I need to know how to code?
faq.a1: No. Everything is configured from the admin panel with simple forms. Zero code.
faq.q2: Do my clients need to create an account?
faq.a2: No. They complete the booking in 4 steps with no registration or password.
faq.q3: What happens when the free trial ends?
faq.a3: Your account is paused until you choose a plan. Your data is kept so you can pick up where you left off whenever you decide to continue.
faq.q4: Can I change plans at any time?
faq.a4: Yes, from your dashboard. Upgrades take effect immediately and you'll be charged the new plan price. Downgrades apply at the end of your current billing cycle, with no additional charges.
faq.q5: What languages is Zyncrox available in?
faq.q6: Does it work for any type of service business?
faq.a6: Yes. Beauty salons, barbershops, spas, independent stylists, aesthetic clinics, home services and more. If you schedule appointments, Zyncrox works for you.
faq.q7: Do I need a card for the free trial?
faq.a7: No. The 7-day trial is completely free, no card and no commitment.
faq.a8: Yes, from the Basic plan. Set up coverage zones with rates, terms, and travel time. Your client books and you receive all the information automatically.

cta.title: Your business deserves a system that works as hard as you do.
cta.subtitle: Start free today. No credit card, no commitments. 7 days with full access to all features.

footer.tagline: The booking platform that adapts to your business.

industry.title: Built for your industry
industry.subtitle: From independent professionals to multi-location chains.
industry.i1Desc: Manage appointments, team, and services from one place.
industry.i2Desc: Your clients choose barber, time, and service without calling.
industry.i3Desc: Multi-service bookings in a single session.
industry.i5Desc: Coverage zones, rates, and automatic logistics.
industry.i6Desc: Photography, consulting, tutoring, fitness, and more.

diff.title: What sets us apart
diff.d1Desc: Other platforms charge up to 20% on every client from their marketplace. Zyncrox doesn't. Your clients are yours, always.
diff.d2Title: Home service from the lowest plan
diff.d2Desc: Most platforms charge extra for it or don't offer it. In Zyncrox it's included because we know many professionals work that way.
diff.d3Desc: It's not our logo your clients see. It's yours. From the Basic plan, your booking portal reflects your identity.
diff.d4Desc: No training needed, no technician required. Set up your business in under 15 minutes and start receiving bookings.

CancelBooking.invalidTokenDesc: This link is not valid or has been altered. Please contact us directly if you need to cancel your appointment.
CancelBooking.notFoundDesc: We could not find this appointment. It may have already been deleted.
CancelBooking.alreadyCancelledDesc: This appointment was already cancelled. No further action is required.
CancelBooking.alreadyFinishedDesc: This appointment has been completed and cannot be cancelled.
CancelBooking.cancelledDesc: Your appointment has been successfully cancelled. If you'd like to reschedule, please contact {tenantName} directly.
CancelBooking.keptDesc: Your appointment is confirmed. If you need to make any changes, contact us directly.
CancelBooking.question: Will you attend your appointment?
CancelBooking.cancelButton: I won't be able to attend
CancelBooking.contactNote: If you have any questions, contact {tenantName} directly.
CancelBooking.tooLateDesc: Online cancellations are only allowed up to {hours} hours before the appointment. To cancel or reschedule, please contact {tenantName} directly.
CancelBooking.tooLateInline: The online cancellation window has passed. Please contact {tenantName} directly.
